open_play_schedule: Open for play during the school year: weekends; weekdays after 4:00 PM; all school year holidays and vacations. Open for play during the summer: every day, all day from the end of the school year (late June) to the start of the school year (late August).

name: Willy's Gym
description:
**Pickleball Enthusiasts, We’ve Got You Covered!**
Check out our climate-controlled indoor pickleball courts, where you can enjoy a game regardless of the weather. We offer:
- **Open Plays**: Drop in and join the fun.
- **Round Robins**: Competitive yet friendly matches.
- **Seeded Ladder Events**: Test and improve your skills.
- **Special Tournaments**: Join in on exciting competitions.
- **Pickleball Socials**: After game unwind with pizza & snacks provided by club and enjoy 
     our cash bar.
Looking for a private event? Our pickleball courts are available for rent, perfect for gatherings with friends and family.

Join us for a fun-filled day of family bonding, active play, and pickleball excitement. It’s the perfect way to spend quality time together while enjoying great food, drinks, and recreational activities!
